items.reason: Documents the two new client URMA failover gflags with source-matching defaults, validation ranges, hot-update config path, disable behavior, and client_dead_timeout_s window semantics.

Client module context covers ObjectClientImpl failover behavior, build mapping, and client test entrypoints but was not updated for UrmaSuccessRateTracker, URMA_DATA_PLANE_FAILURE switching, or the new UT/ST targets.
